title: Phase 14 Activation Readiness — Auditor Decision

technical_seo.notes: Sitemap clean (648 URLs). No auth/dashboard/noindex/404. Canonicals verified. Robots.txt OK.

analytics_reliability.notes: Vercel Analytics working (Qasem confirmed). GA4 working (consent granted). Both tracking live.

indexing_foundation.notes: Tier 1: 10/10 indexed. Tier 2: 12/12 submitted. Tier 3: 20/105 submitted. 49 URLs total. Awaiting re-crawl results.

automation_safety.notes: 17/17 risky crons paused. Auditor system functioning. Safe GSC UI proven (49 URLs, 100% success). No unapproved content.

monetization_readiness.notes: ads.txt live. All policy pages HTTP 200. No prohibited content. Clean for AdSense.

growth_readiness.notes: Tier 3 batch system working. CTR/query systems defined. Internal links architecture solid. Ready but needs re-crawl data.

decision_rationale: Site meets 96/100 readiness score (85 minimum). All safety gates pass: analytics working, sitemap clean, 17 risky crons paused, Auditor operational, AdSense ready. Tier 3 batch system proven (2 batches, 100% success). Phase 14 safe mode (14A.1) demonstrated system works correctly — Auditor held unsafe actions, approved only safe ones.
conditions: Do NOT activate full autonomous content creation yet — start with controlled Day 1
Content pages require Auditor approval with 85/100 minimum
Continue Tier 3 batches (10/day) with safety gates
CTR/position work only on pages NOT in cooldown
No outreach unless follow-ups due AND Auditor approved
Pinterest monitor only — no new pins
Deploy only after Auditor + Technical Guardian clearance
next_step: Qasem/ChatGPT reviews this report → APPROVE → Begin Phase 14 Controlled Day 1
